title: Design System: Two videos and a motherfucking slider

display.purpose: Wordmark and the fader L/R labels only. Shout-once.

headline.purpose: Sparing emphasis where Anton is too loud.

body.purpose: Honest notes and prose. Cap at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Default chrome voice: tags, buttons, inputs, readouts, captions. Uppercase.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Default easing for every state transition. No bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: state
motion.purpose: Deck state changes (cued/playing/errored). Suppressed under prefers-reduced-motion.

breakpoints.name: min-desktop
breakpoints.purpose: Below this the app shows a blocking 'open me wider' state. Desktop-only.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Blunt solid action: Play, Cue. Paper fill, hard corners.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.93 0.015 80); color: oklch(0.16 0.012 60); font-family: 'Space Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; border: 2px solid oklch(0.93 0.015 80); border-radius: 0; padding: 10px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.69 0.21 30); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action: Copy mix link. Outlined, transparent.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.93 0.015 80); font-family: 'Space Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; border: 2px solid oklch(0.27 0.016 60); border-radius: 0; padding: 10px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), border-color 120ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: oklch(0.93 0.015 80); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: URL Input
components.description: Per-deck paste field. Ink well, mono text, red focus.
components.css: .ds-input-url { background: oklch(0.16 0.012 60); color: oklch(0.93 0.015 80); font-family: 'Space Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13px; border: 2px solid oklch(0.27 0.016 60); border-radius: 0; padding: 10px 12px; } .ds-input-url::placeholder { color: oklch(0.72 0.012 80); } .ds-input-url:focus { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.69 0.21 30); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Deck Frame (Left)
components.description: A deck body, framed in its own ink. Left is cyan, right would swap to red.
components.html:
Left deckA
paste a youtube link
components.css: .ds-deck { background: oklch(0.21 0.014 60); border: 2px solid oklch(0.70 0.16 230); border-radius: 0; padding: 14px; } .ds-deck-tag { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.72 0.012 80); margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-dot { display: inline-block; width: 10px; height: 10px; background: oklch(0.70 0.16 230); margin-right: 8px; } .ds-screen { aspect-ratio: 16/9; display: grid; place-items: center; color: oklch(0.72 0.012 80); font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; background: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, oklch(0.27 0.016 60) 0 2px, transparent 2px 14px), oklch(0.16 0.012 60); }

components.name: Crossfader
components.description: Signature component. Fat range with a cyan-to-red blend track, tall paper thumb, Anton L/R ends.
components.html: LR
components.css: .ds-fader-shell { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 18px; } .ds-end { font-family: 'Anton', sans-serif; font-size: 34px; text-transform: uppercase; width: 48px; } .ds-end.l { text-align: right; color: oklch(0.70 0.16 230); } .ds-end.r { color: oklch(0.69 0.21 30); } .ds-fader { flex: 1; appearance: none; width: 100%; height: 26px; background: transparent; cursor: grab; } .ds-fader:active { cursor: grabbing; } .ds-fader::-webkit-slider-runnable-track { height: 14px; border: 2px solid oklch(0.16 0.012 60); background: linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(0.70 0.16 230), oklch(0.69 0.21 30)); } .ds-fader::-webkit-slider-thumb { appearance: none; width: 26px; height: 46px; margin-top: -18px; background: oklch(0.93 0.015 80); border: 3px solid oklch(0.16 0.012 60); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.93 0.015 80); } .ds-fader:focus-visible::-webkit-slider-thumb { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.69 0.21 30); }

narrative.overview: A punk show flyer that happens to mix audio: a riso-printed gig poster run off in two ink colors, dark room, one in the morning, both videos glowing on a laptop while someone drags a fat slider for the hell of it. Warm near-black canvas, grain over everything, blunt poster type, and exactly two screaming inks (cyan left, red right) that bleed together at the crossfader. The two colors are information, not decoration: you can read which side is winning from across the room. Depth is flat (2px borders, three tonal steps of ink), corners are hard, nothing apologizes.
keyCharacteristics: Two named inks (cyan left, red right) carry deck identity, the fader track, and the gain readouts.
Warm near-black canvas, never pure black; off-white text, never pure white.
Riso grain over the whole surface; flat, hard-cornered, 2px-bordered chrome.
Blunt poster display type (Anton) over monospace utility labels (Space Mono).
The crossfader is the heaviest object on screen, by design.

rules.name: The Two-Ink Rule
rules.body: Exactly two chromatic colors: Left Cyan and Right Red, reserved for deck identity and the crossfader. Never a third hue; neutrals tinted only with canvas warmth (chroma <= 0.016).

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black Rule
rules.body: #000 and #fff are forbidden. Darkest is Ink, lightest is Paper. Pure values look like a bug.

rules.name: The Shout-Once Rule
rules.body: Anton appears at most twice: the wordmark and the fader L/R. Everything else is Space Mono or Archivo.

rules.name: The Flat Print Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow, no blur, no glass, ever. Lift via border color or tonal step, or fill with an ink.

dos: Do keep exactly two inks: Left Cyan oklch(0.70 0.16 230) and Right Red oklch(0.69 0.21 30). Cyan always left, red always right.
Do make the crossfader the single heaviest element on the page, with the most surrounding space.
Do carry deck identity redundantly: ink color AND L/R label AND fader position AND text gain readout. Color is never the only signal.
Do keep all corners hard (0px) and all depth flat (2px borders, tonal steps).
Do write chrome in Space Mono uppercase; reserve Anton for the wordmark and the fader L/R only.
Do keep neutrals warm-tinted near-black/off-white (chroma <= 0.016), never pure #000/#fff.
donts: Don't build a generic SaaS dashboard: no card grids, no sidebar nav, no hero-metric tiles, no rounded-corner blandness.
Don't drift corporate / safe: nothing beige, focus-grouped, or sanded down.
Don't approach pro-DAW clutter: no wall of meters, knobs, or tiny labels.
Don't reach for the neon-synth-toy reflex: no glowing knobs, no glossy skeuomorphic dials, no RGB.
Don't use box-shadow, backdrop-filter, glassmorphism, gradient text, or side-stripe borders.
Don't introduce a third color or round a corner.
